## What changed

Describe the user-visible or engineering change.

## Why

Explain the problem, decision, and alternatives considered.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has automated coverage.
- [ ] Responsive or visual changes include non-sensitive evidence.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where behavior or architecture changed.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No webcam images, raw pose landmarks, health information, or credentials are included.
- [ ] Authoritative scoring and recommendations remain deterministic.
- [ ] AI, storage, and network inputs are validated at their boundaries.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for presentation changes, or write **Not applicable**.
